title: Mr. 5 and Miss Valentine Arrive
description: On pages 17–19, mr. 5 and miss valentine arrive as zoro cuts through the Baroque Works agents at Whiskey Peak while Luffy wakes up and misunderstands the situation.
scene: Mr. 5 and Miss Valentine Arrive. Zoro cuts through the Baroque Works agents at Whiskey Peak while Luffy wakes up and misunderstands the situation. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Where's that strength that you're so proud of...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Aghhh! He beat Miss Monday in pure strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A fight's no mere game, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That wanted poster must be a mistake on the Marines' part!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Of course! I can certainly understand if he was the one worth 30 million bell...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He must be their real captain!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I see... then let us act accordingly...

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: I thought it was quite strange,

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Is there any more meat left...?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: that their grinning idiot of a captain was supposed to be worth 30 million...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Check dis gallery! Check check it!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 5 and miss valentine arrive. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
